productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Casual Grey Shoes
description: Composition:The shoe sole is made of rubber and the upper is a mix of leather and synthetic.Shoe care:With a soft clean and damp cloth rub the surface to remove the dust, not to machine wash.Fitting:Regular.These numero uno sneakers in black with bold grey panels and white stich detailing creates a perfect harmony between good design and cool attitude. These shoes exude confidence. Team it up with jeans or any other casuals to make a super cool statement. Perfect for all casual outings.
